value.title: Why Qualcomm (QCOM) Stock Is Up Today
value.summary: Shares of wireless chipmaker Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) jumped 4.3% in the morning session after the company announced an aggressive expansion into the AI data center market with ambitious long-term revenue targets during its 2026 Investor Day.

value.title: Meta Stock: 'Bulls Are Frustrated' But Analyst Sees Big Potential For AI Business Push
value.summary: Meta stock could see a boost from the company's plan to offer AI business agents on WhatsApp and Messenger, an analyst said.

value.title: Amazon Stock Slips Below Key Level. Why It's A Rough Day For Cloud Hyperscaler Stocks.
value.summary: Amazon stock broke below its 200-day line as it continued a slump that has wiped out its rally from April.
